name: @lnittman/pi-tools
description_en: Tool-pack contract for pi-mono SDK consumers — composable extension factories for code, HIL, orchestration, and annotation capabilities, consumable by any product that uses @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent
description_zh: pi-mono SDK 使用者的工具包契约 — 用于代码、HIL、编排和注释能力的可组合扩展工厂，任何使用 @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent 的产品均可使用
